intro: APT37 (ScarCruft, InkySquid), ClickFix, and Lazarus Group were the most prominent threat actors in 42 articles covering social-engineering tactics from April 8 to April 23, 2026. The coverage included 30 high-severity and 11 medium-severity reports, with one informational piece. Affected sectors spanned cryptocurrency, financial-services, technology, financial services, and government, while targeted regions included Global, United states, Canada, North america, and United kingdom.
